notes: Closed-set taxonomy for canonical.permits TX classification.
Derived from the top 200 permit_type values by frequency for vetted TX rows (data/tx_permit_types_top200.txt).

Precedence rule: classify by the permit's OWN scope, not the parent project. A standalone 'Electrical Permit / New' pulled for a new house is 'electrical', not 'residential_new'. Only the building permit itself for a new dwelling is 'residential_new'.
Trade-permit subtypes (New/Remodel/Repair/Change Out/Addition) stay in the trade category.
When permit_type is a generic department bucket (e.g. 'Building Inspections and Permits', 'Historical'), classify from description_raw; if description is also empty/uninformative, use other_unknown.

categories.name: Residential New Construction
categories.description: New single-family home, duplex, or townhome building permit (the structure itself, not trade permits pulled under it).
examples: Building (BU) Single Family  New Construction / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING

categories.name: Multi-Family New Construction
categories.description: New apartment, condominium, or other multi-family building permit (3+ units).
examples: Building (BU) Multi Family  New Construction / MULTI-FAMILY DWELLING
Building Permit / New (description: new 24-unit apartment building)
Comm New Building Permit / New (description: multi-family)

categories.name: Residential Remodel / Repair
categories.description: Interior or exterior remodel, renovation, alteration, or general repair of an existing residential structure (single- or multi-family).
examples: Building (BU) Single Family  Alteration / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING

categories.name: Residential Addition
categories.description: Room addition, second story, attached garage addition, covered patio/porch, or addition-and-remodel on a residential structure.
examples: Building (BU) Single Family  Addition / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING
Covered Patio or Porch Permit / Existing

categories.name: Commercial New Construction
categories.description: New commercial, office, retail, industrial, institutional, or mixed-use building, including shell buildings.

categories.name: Commercial Remodel / Tenant Improvement
categories.description: Remodel, renovation, tenant finish-out, interior alteration, or repair of an existing commercial building.

categories.name: Roofing / Re-Roof
categories.description: Roof replacement, re-roof, or roof repair on any structure type.
examples: Building Permit / Repair (description: reroof composition shingles)
Residential Repair Permit (description: replace roof decking and shingles)

categories.name: Electrical
categories.description: Electrical trade permit of any subtype: service upgrade, rewire, panel change, loop, temporary power, auxiliary power, security systems, low voltage.

categories.name: Plumbing / Gas
categories.description: Plumbing trade permit of any subtype: water/sewer lines, gas lines, backflow prevention, water heater change-out, sewer cut-over, fixture work.

categories.name: Mechanical / HVAC
categories.description: Mechanical trade permit of any subtype: HVAC install, A/C or furnace change-out, ductwork, ventilation, exhaust systems.
examples: Mechanical (ME) Single Family  Alteration / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING

categories.name: Solar / Photovoltaic
categories.description: Solar panel or photovoltaic system installation, including battery storage tied to solar.
examples: Electrical Permit (description: install roof-mounted PV solar array)
Building Permit (description: 8.5 kW solar photovoltaic system)

categories.name: Pool / Spa
categories.description: Swimming pool, spa, or hot tub construction, renovation, or demolition-of-pool permits.
examples: Swimming Pool (SW) Single Family  Renovation / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING
Building Permit (description: in-ground gunite pool and spa)

categories.name: Septic / OSSF
categories.description: On-site sewage facility: septic tank install, repair, replacement, drainfield work, aerobic systems, septic abandonment.
examples: Plumbing Permit / Cut Over/Tank Abandonment (description: abandon septic tank, connect to city sewer)

categories.name: Demolition
categories.description: Full or partial demolition of a structure, including interior non-structural demo.
examples: Demolition Permit SFD/Duplex / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING

categories.name: Sign
categories.description: Sign installation or alteration: on-premise signs, electrical signs, billboards, banners.
examples: Electrical Sign New Construction / OFFICE BUILDING

categories.name: Fence
categories.description: Fence or wall installation, replacement, or repair (includes retaining walls when permitted as fence/wall).
examples: Fence (FE) Single Family  Alteration / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING

categories.name: Driveway / Sidewalk / Flatwork
categories.description: Driveway, sidewalk, curb cut, drive approach, patio slab, or other concrete flatwork.
examples: Paving (Sidewalk, Drive Approaches) (PV) Single Fa / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING

categories.name: Irrigation / Lawn Sprinkler
categories.description: Lawn sprinkler or landscape irrigation system installation or repair.
examples: Lawn Sprinkler (LS) Single Family  Alteration / SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING

categories.name: Fire Protection Systems
categories.description: Fire sprinkler, fire alarm, fire line, fire suppression, or other life-safety fire system work.

categories.name: Grading / Sitework
categories.description: Grading, excavation, drainage, site preparation, paving of sites, erosion control, road/bridge construction and maintenance.

categories.name: Mobile / Manufactured Home
categories.description: Manufactured or mobile home placement, installation, or RV-as-dwelling permits.
examples: Building Permit / Relocation (description: move manufactured home onto lot)

categories.name: Accessory Structure
categories.description: Detached garage, shed, carport, barn, workshop, gazebo, deck, or other accessory building on residential or commercial property.

categories.name: Water Well
categories.description: Water well drilling, plugging, or pump installation (not oil/gas wells).
examples: Plumbing Permit (description: connect domestic water well to house)

categories.name: Oil & Gas Surface Activity
categories.description: Oil/gas related surface permits: gas well drilling within city limits, pipelines, compressor stations, seismic surveys, production facilities.

categories.name: Right-of-Way / Utility
categories.description: Work in public right-of-way, utility excavation/locates, franchise utility, street cuts, barricades, utility service connections.

categories.name: Event / Temporary Use
categories.description: Temporary structures or uses: tents, special events, garage sales, temporary banners, RV parking, food trailers, temporary occupancy.
examples: Garage Sale Permit/ Recreational Vehicle (RV) Parking Permits

categories.name: Foundation Repair
categories.description: Foundation repair, leveling, or underpinning of an existing structure.
examples: Building Permit / Repair (description: install 22 foundation piers)

categories.name: Land Development / Platting / Zoning
categories.description: Subdivision plats, site plans, zoning cases, variances, design review, floodplain development review.

categories.name: Tree / Landscape
categories.description: Tree removal/pruning permits, urban forestry reviews, landscape permits.

categories.name: Administrative / Licensing / Registration
categories.description: Non-construction administrative records: contractor registration, certificates of occupancy, business licenses, rental registration, inspections-only records.
examples: Housing (Multi-Family Registration, Single-Family Long-Term Registration, Short-Term Rental Registration (Airbnb, vrbo, etc.))

categories.name: Code Enforcement / Violation
categories.description: Code compliance cases, violations, environmental nuisance complaints, substandard structure cases.
examples: Neighborhood Services/Code Compliance (description: substandard structure case)

categories.name: Other / Unknown
categories.description: Cannot be determined from the given fields, or genuinely outside every other category (e.g. department-only records with empty descriptions).
